case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. NATASHA SINGH

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM SARAH HEYWORTH FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT NATASHA SINGH IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, NATASHA $1,439.33 PRINCIPAL, $92.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,531.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
